sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29139" key="du/skaustos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δύσκαυστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29139.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to burn</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:139:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">139.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
